functions.name: getDetail
functions.description:
Retrieves detailed information for a specific action block.

Returns the full configuration, metadata, and current state of the
action block identified by the given identifier string.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: The unique identifier or name of the action block

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the detailed ActionBlockDetail object

functions.name: getExecutions
functions.description:
Retrieves execution records for action blocks.

Returns a list of past and current executions, useful for monitoring
which action blocks have run and their outcomes.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of ActionBlockExecution records

functions.name: getStats
functions.description:
Retrieves aggregate statistics about action blocks.

Returns counts, success rates, and other summary metrics for all
action blocks in the system.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an ActionBlockStats object with summary metrics

functions.name: getTypes
functions.description:
Retrieves the list of available action block types.

Returns the distinct type identifiers that can be used when creating
or filtering action blocks.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of type name strings

functions.name: list
functions.description:
Retrieves all registered action blocks.

Returns the full list of action blocks available in the current workspace.
Use optional query parameters to paginate or filter the results.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of ActionBlock objects

functions.name: refresh
functions.description:
Refreshes the action block registry.

Forces a re-scan and reload of all registered action blocks, picking up
any newly added or modified block definitions.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Optional configuration for the refresh operation

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the refresh is complete

functions.name: stop
functions.description:
Stops a currently running action block execution.

Sends a stop signal to the specified action block execution, causing it
to terminate gracefully. Use this to cancel long-running or stuck executions.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The stop request containing the execution identifier to halt

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the stop signal has been sent

functions.name: addTask
functions.description:
Adds a task to an existing action plan.

Appends a new task to the plan's task list. Tasks represent individual
steps that need to be completed as part of the overall plan.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the action plan

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The task definition to add to the plan

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the task has been added

functions.name: create
functions.description:
Creates a new action plan.

Defines a new structured workflow plan that can be populated with tasks
and executed by agents.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The creation payload for the new action plan

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created ActionPlan

functions.name: delete
functions.description:
Deletes an action plan.

Permanently removes the specified action plan and all its associated tasks.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the action plan to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the plan has been deleted

functions.name: get
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific action plan by its ID.

Returns the full action plan including its tasks, status, and metadata.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the action plan

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the ActionPlan object

functions.name: list
functions.description:
Retrieves all action plans.

Returns every action plan in the system. Use optional query parameters
to paginate or filter the results.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of ActionPlan objects

functions.name: update
functions.description:
Updates an existing action plan.

Modifies the properties of an action plan such as its name, description,
or status.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the action plan to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update on the action plan

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated ActionPlan

functions.name: cleanup
functions.description:
Cleans up old agent debug data.

Removes debug records that are older than the specified threshold.
Use this to free up storage and keep the debug system performant.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Query parameters controlling the cleanup

returns.description: A promise that resolves when cleanup is complete

functions.name: getBySwarm
functions.description:
Retrieves agent instances associated with a specific swarm.

Returns all debug instances that belong to the given swarm, useful for
inspecting multi-agent coordination.

parameters.name: swarmId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the swarm to query

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of AgentDebugInstance objects for that swarm

functions.name: getByThread
functions.description:
Retrieves agent instances associated with a specific thread.

Returns all debug instances that were spawned within or are linked to
the given thread ID.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread to query

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of AgentDebugInstance objects for that thread

functions.name: getFilteredInstances
functions.description:
Retrieves agent instances matching specific filter criteria.

Supports filtering by status, agent type, thread ID, swarm ID, and
whether the agent is running in the background.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Filter parameters to narrow down results

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of matching AgentDebugInstance objects

functions.name: getInstance
functions.description:
Retrieves details for a specific agent debug instance.

Returns the full debug record for a single agent instance including
its configuration, status, timing, and metadata.

parameters.name: agentInstanceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent instance

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the AgentDebugInstance object

functions.name: getInstanceLogs
functions.description:
Retrieves parsed and structured logs for a specific agent instance.

Returns logs that have been parsed into structured AgentDebugLog objects,
making them easier to analyze programmatically. Supports pagination
through offset and limit parameters.

parameters.name: agentInstanceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent instance

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional pagination parameters

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of structured AgentDebugLog objects

functions.name: getInstanceRawLogs
functions.description:
Retrieves raw, unprocessed logs for a specific agent instance.

Returns the raw log output as produced by the agent, without any
parsing or structuring. Useful for debugging issues not captured
by the structured log parser.

parameters.name: agentInstanceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent instance

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional pagination parameters

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the raw log data

functions.name: getInstances
functions.description:
Retrieves all agent debug instances.

Returns every agent instance that has been tracked by the debug system,
regardless of its current status.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of AgentDebugInstance objects

functions.name: getRunning
functions.description:
Retrieves all currently running agent instances.

A convenience method that returns only instances with an active/running status,
useful for real-time monitoring dashboards.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of running AgentDebugInstance objects

functions.name: rebuildIndex
functions.description:
Rebuilds the agent debug index.

Forces a full re-index of all agent debug data. This can resolve
issues with missing or inconsistent search results in the debug interface.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Optional configuration for the rebuild operation

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the index rebuild is complete

functions.name: addResponse
functions.description:
Adds a response to a deliberation.

Submits a new proposal or answer from an agent as part of the
deliberation process.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deliberation

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The response payload containing the agent's proposal

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created DeliberationResponse

functions.name: addVote
functions.description:
Casts a vote on a deliberation.

Records an agent's vote for a specific response within the deliberation.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deliberation

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The vote payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the recorded DeliberationVote

functions.name: create
functions.description:
Creates a new deliberation.

Initiates a deliberation session where multiple agents can propose
solutions and vote on the best approach.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The deliberation creation payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created Deliberation

functions.name: delete
functions.description:
Deletes a deliberation.

Permanently removes the specified deliberation and all its associated
responses and votes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deliberation to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the deliberation has been deleted

functions.name: get
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific deliberation by ID.

Returns the full deliberation record including its topic, status,
participants, and summary.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deliberation

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the Deliberation object

functions.name: getAll
functions.description:
Retrieves all deliberations.

Returns every deliberation in the system, optionally filtered by
the provided query parameters.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query or filter parameters

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of Deliberation objects

functions.name: getResponses
functions.description:
Retrieves all responses submitted to a deliberation.

Returns the proposals or answers that agents have submitted as part
of the deliberation process.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deliberation

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of DeliberationResponse objects

functions.name: getVotes
functions.description:
Retrieves all votes cast in a deliberation.

Returns the voting records showing which agents voted for which
responses.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deliberation

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of DeliberationVote objects

functions.name: getWinner
functions.description:
Retrieves the winning response of a deliberation.

Returns the response that received the most votes or was otherwise
selected as the winner of the deliberation process.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deliberation

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the winning DeliberationResponse

functions.name: startAgents
functions.description:
Starts agents for a deliberation.

Launches the participant agents so they can begin generating responses
for the deliberation topic.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deliberation

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Optional configuration for the agent startup

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the agents have been started

functions.name: startVotingAgents
functions.description:
Starts voting agents for a deliberation.

Launches the voting agents so they can evaluate the submitted responses
and cast their votes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deliberation

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Optional configuration for the voting agent startup

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the voting agents have been started

functions.name: update
functions.description:
Partially updates a deliberation.

Applies a patch to the deliberation record, updating only the
fields provided in the request.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deliberation to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to patch on the deliberation

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated Deliberation

functions.name: updateSummary
functions.description:
Updates the summary of a deliberation.

Sets or modifies the summary text that describes the outcome or
current state of the deliberation.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deliberation

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The summary update payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated Deliberation

functions.name: cleanupExecutions
functions.description:
Cleans up old execution records.

Removes execution records older than the specified threshold to free
up storage and keep the system performant.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Query parameters controlling the cleanup

returns.description: A promise that resolves when cleanup is complete

functions.name: getExecution
functions.description:
Retrieves the execution record for a specific thread.

Returns detailed execution information including timing, status,
agent configuration, and outcome for the given thread.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the AgentExecutionRecord for that thread

functions.name: getExecutions
functions.description:
Retrieves all agent execution records.

Returns the complete history of agent executions, useful for auditing
and monitoring agent activity over time.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of AgentExecutionRecord objects

functions.name: getExecutionTree
functions.description:
Retrieves the execution tree for a specific thread.

Returns a hierarchical view of the execution, showing parent-child
relationships between agents in multi-agent workflows. Useful for
visualizing how agents spawned sub-agents during execution.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the AgentExecutionTree structure

functions.name: getFilteredExecutions
functions.description:
Retrieves agent executions matching specific filter criteria.

Supports filtering by status, swarm ID, start source, thread ID,
and whether the execution ran in the background.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Filter parameters to narrow down results

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of matching AgentExecutionRecord objects

functions.name: getSwarmIds
functions.description:
Retrieves all known swarm IDs from execution history.

Returns a list of unique swarm identifiers that appear in the execution
records, useful for populating filter dropdowns or discovering swarms.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of swarm ID strings

functions.name: create
functions.description:
Creates a new execution phase.

Defines a new phase in the agent execution lifecycle. The phase will
be available for agents to transition through during their execution.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The phase creation payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created AgentExecutionPhase

functions.name: delete
functions.description:
Deletes an execution phase.

Permanently removes the specified execution phase from the system.
Agents will no longer transition through this phase.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The unique name of the phase to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the phase has been deleted

functions.name: get
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific execution phase by its name.

Returns the full definition of a single phase including its
configuration, order, and associated behavior.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The unique name of the execution phase

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the AgentExecutionPhase object

functions.name: getAll
functions.description:
Retrieves all defined agent execution phases.

Returns the complete list of execution phases that have been configured
in the system.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of AgentExecutionPhase objects

functions.name: reset
functions.description:
Resets all agent execution phases to their default configuration.

Restores the built-in phase definitions, removing any custom phases
and reverting modified ones to their original state.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Optional configuration for the reset operation

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the reset is complete

functions.name: update
functions.description:
Updates an existing execution phase.

Modifies the configuration of an execution phase. Use this to change
the phase description, ordering, or other properties.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The unique name of the phase to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update on the phase

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated AgentExecutionPhase

functions.name: create
functions.description:
Creates a new agent flow.

Defines a new node-based workflow that agents can execute. The flow
consists of interconnected plugin nodes that define the processing pipeline.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The flow creation payload including nodes and connections

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created AgentFlow

functions.name: get
functions.description:
Retrieves agent flow(s).

Returns one or more agent flows based on the provided query parameters.
Use this to look up flows by name, ID, or other criteria.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters to identify which flow(s) to retrieve

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the AgentFlow object

functions.name: getPlugins
functions.description:
Retrieves available agent flow plugins.

Returns the list of plugin types that can be used as nodes within
agent flows, each defining a specific processing capability.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering plugins

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of AgentFlowPlugin objects

functions.name: getPluginUi
functions.description:
Retrieves the UI definition for a specific flow plugin.

Returns the schema and layout information needed to render the
plugin's configuration interface in the flow editor.

parameters.name: pluginName
parameters.description: The name of the plugin to get the UI definition for

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the AgentFlowPluginUi definition

functions.name: update
functions.description:
Updates an existing agent flow.

Modifies the node configuration, connections, or metadata of an
existing flow.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The update payload containing the modified flow data

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated AgentFlow

functions.name: addTalent
functions.description:
Adds a talent to an agent's portfolio.

Records a specific skill or capability that the agent possesses,
building out their talent profile.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The talent definition to add

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created AgentTalent

functions.name: awardKarma
functions.description:
Awards karma points to an agent.

Increases an agent's karma score as recognition for good work.
Karma contributes to the agent's overall portfolio ranking.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The karma award payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the karma has been awarded

functions.name: createTestimonial
functions.description:
Creates a new testimonial for an agent.

Adds a testimonial or review to an agent's portfolio, recording
feedback about their performance.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The testimonial creation payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created AgentTestimonial

functions.name: deleteTestimonial
functions.description:
Deletes a testimonial.

Permanently removes the specified testimonial from an agent's portfolio.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the testimonial to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the testimonial has been deleted

functions.name: endorseTalent
functions.description:
Endorses a talent on an agent's portfolio.

Adds an endorsement to a specific talent, increasing its credibility.
Similar to LinkedIn skill endorsements.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The endorsement payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the endorsement has been recorded

functions.name: getAgentConversations
functions.description:
Retrieves conversation history for an agent's portfolio.

Returns the list of conversations the agent has participated in,
providing context for their portfolio activity.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the agent's conversation records

functions.name: getAgentKarma
functions.description:
Retrieves karma details for a specific agent.

Returns the agent's karma score breakdown including total karma,
recent awards, and karma history.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering karma records

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the AgentKarma details

functions.name: getAgentPortfolio
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific agent's portfolio.

Returns the full portfolio for a single agent, including their profile,
karma, talents, testimonials, and performance metrics.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the AgentPortfolio object

functions.name: getAgentTalents
functions.description:
Retrieves all talents for a specific agent.

Returns the list of skills and capabilities registered in the
agent's portfolio, along with endorsement counts.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of AgentTalent objects

functions.name: getByProject
functions.description:
Retrieves agent portfolios filtered by project.

Returns portfolios for agents that have contributed to a specific project,
useful for understanding which agents are active in a project context.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Parameters to filter portfolios by project

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of AgentPortfolio objects

functions.name: getRanking
functions.description:
Retrieves agent portfolio rankings.

Returns agents sorted by their portfolio score, karma, or other
ranking criteria. Useful for discovering top-performing agents.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional ranking parameters for sorting and filtering

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of ranked AgentPortfolio objects

functions.name: sendAppreciation
functions.description:
Sends an appreciation to an agent.

Records a lightweight positive feedback signal for an agent,
similar to a "like" or "thumbs up" on their work.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The appreciation payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the appreciation has been sent

functions.name: updateAgentProfile
functions.description:
Updates an agent's profile information.

Modifies the profile section of an agent's portfolio, such as their
display name, description, or avatar.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The profile fields to update

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated AgentPortfolio

functions.name: updateTestimonial
functions.description:
Updates an existing testimonial.

Modifies the content or metadata of a previously submitted testimonial.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the testimonial to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update on the testimonial

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated AgentTestimonial

functions.name: changeAgent
functions.description:
Changes the currently active agent.

Switches the runtime to use a different agent, stopping the current
one if necessary. Use this when transitioning between different agent
types during a workflow.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The agent change configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly active Agent instance

functions.name: createCustomLocalAgent
functions.description:
Creates a custom local agent.

Defines a new agent from scratch on the local filesystem with custom
configuration, making it available for use in the runtime.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The custom agent creation configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created Agent

functions.name: createFlowAgent
functions.description:
Creates a flow-based agent.

Defines a new agent that operates based on a visual flow definition,
where behavior is determined by connected nodes in a flow graph.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The flow agent creation configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created Agent

functions.name: createRemoteAgent
functions.description:
Creates a remote agent.

Registers a new agent that runs on a remote server, allowing
CodeBolt to delegate tasks to external agent services.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The remote agent creation configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created Agent

functions.name: deleteRemixAgent
functions.description:
Deletes a remix agent.

Permanently removes the specified remix agent from the system.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the remix agent to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the remix agent has been deleted

functions.name: getAgentConfig
functions.description:
Retrieves the configuration for a specific agent by name.

Returns the full configuration object for the named agent, including
its capabilities, settings, and metadata.

parameters.name: agentName
parameters.description: The name of the agent to look up

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the AgentConfig for the specified agent

functions.name: getAgentConfigs
functions.description:
Retrieves all agent configurations.

Returns configuration objects for every registered agent in the system.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of AgentConfig objects

functions.name: getAgentFromLocal
functions.description:
Retrieves the agent stored in local storage.

Returns the agent configuration that has been persisted locally,
typically the last-used or default agent for the current workspace.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the locally stored Agent

functions.name: getAgentProperties
functions.description:
Retrieves the global agent properties.

Returns system-wide properties that apply to all agents, such as
default timeouts, resource limits, and shared configuration.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the AgentProperties object

functions.name: getAllRemixAgents
functions.description:
Retrieves all remix agents.

Returns every remix agent that has been created in the system.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of RemixAgent objects

functions.name: getFeaturedAgents
functions.description:
Retrieves featured agents from the agent registry.

Returns a curated list of agents that are highlighted or promoted
in the CodeBolt marketplace.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of featured Agent objects

functions.name: getInstalled
functions.description:
Retrieves all installed agents.

Returns every agent that has been installed in the current CodeBolt
environment, whether from the registry or locally.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of installed Agent objects

functions.name: getInstalledAgentsAction
functions.description:
Retrieves action configurations for all installed agents.

Returns the action capability definitions for each installed agent,
describing what actions they can perform.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of AgentConfig objects

functions.name: getLocalAgents
functions.description:
Retrieves agents installed from local sources.

Returns only agents that were installed from the local filesystem,
excluding those from the remote registry.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of locally installed Agent objects

functions.name: getRecommendedAgents
functions.description:
Retrieves recommended agents based on the current context.

Returns agents that are suggested based on the current project type,
user preferences, or usage patterns.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of recommended Agent objects

functions.name: getRemixAgent
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific remix agent by name.

Returns the full definition of a remix agent, including its
base agent reference and customizations.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the remix agent to retrieve

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the RemixAgent object

functions.name: getRunningAgents
functions.description:
Retrieves all currently running agents.

Returns a list of agents that are actively executing in the runtime.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of running Agent objects

functions.name: install
functions.description:
Installs an agent from the remote registry.

Downloads and registers an agent from the CodeBolt agent marketplace,
making it available for local use.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The installation configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the installed Agent

functions.name: installLocal
functions.description:
Installs an agent from a local file path.

Loads and registers an agent from the local filesystem, making it
available for use in the runtime.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The local installation configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the installed Agent

functions.name: saveRemixAgent
functions.description:
Saves a remix agent.

Creates or saves a remix agent, which is a customized variant of an
existing agent with modified prompts, settings, or capabilities.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The remix agent definition to save

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the saved RemixAgent

functions.name: startAgent
functions.description:
Starts a new agent instance with the specified configuration.

Initializes and launches an agent process in the CodeBolt runtime.
The agent will be configured based on the provided request parameters
including its type, capabilities, and execution context.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The agent start configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the started Agent instance with its runtime details

functions.name: stopAgent
functions.description:
Stops a running agent.

Sends a stop signal to the specified agent, causing it to terminate
gracefully.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The stop request configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the agent has been stopped

functions.name: updateAgent
functions.description:
Updates an installed agent to a newer version.

Applies updates to an already-installed agent, pulling the latest
version from the registry or local source.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The update configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated Agent

functions.name: updateAgentIndex
functions.description:
Updates the agent router index.

Forces a rebuild of the internal routing index that maps tasks to
appropriate agents. Call this after installing or removing agents.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the index has been updated

functions.name: updateAgentProperties
functions.description:
Updates the global agent properties.

Modifies system-wide agent settings that apply to all agent instances.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The updated agent properties

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated AgentProperties

functions.name: updateRemixAgent
functions.description:

functions.name: addEnvAndServices

and service configurations to the current workspace.

configuration, user preferences, and runtime status.

and global application settings.

Saves the tree view state.

expanded nodes, scroll position, and selection.

Sets the mode layout configuration.

parameters.description: The mode layout configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the layout has been set

agent for quick access.

parameters.description: The pinning configuration

functions.description:

Removes the pinned agent from the UI, reverting to the default
agent selection behavior.

parameters.description: Optional unpin configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the agent has been unpinned

functions.name: updateAppState

configuration across sessions.

functions.name: updateRootAppState

Updates the root application state.

global settings across all workspaces.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The root state update payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the state has been updated

Launches the app's source code or configuration in an editable mode,
allowing modifications to its behavior.

parameters.description: The edit configuration

environment for use.

functionality active in the runtime.

latest metadata is available without a full reload.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the cache has been updated

functions.name: addCaseToSuite

parameters.description: The test suite creation payload

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the test case to delete

Deletes a test suite.

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the test suite to delete

associated test case references.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the TestSuite object

functions.description:

functions.description:
Retrieves all test runs.

results, and timing information.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update on the test run

existing test suite.

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the test suite to update

parameters.name: data

functions.name: get

excluding terminated or stopped instances.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of BackgroundAgentInstance objects

functions.description:

Launches a background agent that will run continuously until explicitly
stopped. Background agents are suitable for long-running monitoring,
indexing, or maintenance tasks.

parameters.description: Optional screenshot configuration

complex multi-step actions.

parameters.description: The capability creation payload

parameters.description: The executor creation payload

modules.name: chat
modules.description: Chat API - thread management, messaging, steps, and steering

functions.name: activateThreadStep
functions.description:
Activates a step in a chat thread.

Marks the specified step as the currently active step, indicating
that work is in progress on this step.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

parameters.name: stepId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the step to activate

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the activated ChatThreadStep

functions.name: addSteeringStep
functions.description:
Adds a steering step to a thread.

Creates a steering step that guides the agent's behavior during
execution, providing directional instructions or constraints.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The steering step creation payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created SteeringStep

functions.name: addStep
functions.description:
Adds a step to a thread via the add-step endpoint.

An alternative method for adding steps that accepts the thread ID
as part of the request body rather than the URL path.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The step addition request including thread ID and step data

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created ChatThreadStep

functions.description:
Adds a step to a chat thread.

Creates a new step within the thread's step sequence, representing
a discrete unit of work or progress in the conversation.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

parameters.name: stepData
parameters.description: The step definition including type and content

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created ChatThreadStep

functions.description:
Automatically generates and updates the thread name based on content.

Uses the user's message or conversation context to generate a
descriptive name for the thread, replacing any existing name.

parameters.description: The auto-update request

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the name has been auto-updated

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

parameters.name: stepId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the step to complete

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Optional completion details

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the completed ChatThreadStep

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the step to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the step has been deleted

functions.name: getPheromones
functions.description:
Retrieves all pheromones attached to a specific job.

Returns the list of pheromone signals that have been deposited on the
job by agents, useful for understanding the job's coordination state.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the job

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of  objects

functions.name: getPheromoneTypes
functions.description:
Retrieves all registered pheromone types.

Pheromone types define the categories of signals that can be attached
to jobs for swarm-style coordination between agents.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of  definitions

functions.name: getReady
functions.description:
Retrieves all jobs that are ready to execute.

Returns jobs whose dependencies have all been satisfied, meaning
they can be picked up by agents immediately.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of ready  objects

functions.name: getStatistics
functions.description:
Retrieves aggregate statistics about the job system.

Returns counts and metrics such as total jobs, jobs by status,
average completion time, and other summary data. Useful for
dashboards and progress reporting.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to a  summary

functions.name: removeDependency
functions.description:
Removes a dependency from a job.

Detaches the dependency link between the job and its target, which
may unblock the job if this was its only remaining dependency.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the dependent job

parameters.name: targetId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the dependency target to remove

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the dependency has been removed

functions.name: removePheromone
functions.description:
Removes a pheromone of a specific type from a job.

Clears the pheromone signal, which may affect coordination behavior
of agents that rely on its presence.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the job

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The pheromone type name to remove

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the pheromone has been removed

functions.name: update
functions.description:
Updates an existing job.

Modifies job properties such as title, description, status, or
assignee. Only the fields provided in the request body are updated.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the job to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated

functions.name: updateGroup
functions.description:
Updates an existing job group.

Modifies group properties such as name, description, or metadata.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the group to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update on the group

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated

functions.name: addDocumentFromUrl
functions.description:
Adds a document to a collection by fetching it from a URL.

Downloads the content at the specified URL and adds it as a document
to the collection. The content is automatically parsed and chunked.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the target collection

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Request specifying the URL and optional metadata

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the document has been fetched and added

functions.name: addDocuments
functions.description:
Adds one or more documents to a knowledge collection.

Uploads documents that will be automatically processed, chunked,
and indexed for retrieval. Supports multiple documents in a single request.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the target collection

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The documents to add, including their content and metadata

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the documents have been added and processing has begun

functions.name: createCollection
functions.description:
Creates a new knowledge collection.

A collection is a named container for related documents. Documents
added to a collection are automatically chunked and indexed for
retrieval by agents.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Collection creation payload including name and configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created

functions.name: deleteCollection
functions.description:
Deletes a knowledge collection and all its documents.

Permanently removes the collection, its documents, and all
associated chunks. This action cannot be undone.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when deletion is complete

functions.name: deleteDocument
functions.description:
Deletes a document and all its associated chunks.

Permanently removes the document from its collection. The collection
itself is not affected.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the document to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when deletion is complete

functions.name: getCollection
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific knowledge collection by its ID.

Returns the full details of a collection including its metadata,
document count, and configuration.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the knowledge collection

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the

functions.name: getDocument
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific document by its ID.

Returns the full details of a document including its metadata,
processing status, and chunk count.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the document

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the

functions.name: getSettings
functions.description:
Retrieves the settings for a knowledge collection.

Returns the collection's chunking configuration, embedding settings,
and other processing parameters.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the

functions.name: getStrategies
functions.description:
Retrieves all available chunking strategies.

Returns the list of chunking algorithms that can be used when
processing documents (e.g., fixed-size, sentence-based, semantic).

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of  descriptors

functions.name: getStrategyOptions
functions.description:
Retrieves the configurable options for a specific chunking strategy.

Returns the parameter schema for the strategy, including defaults
and valid ranges. Use this to build dynamic configuration UIs.

parameters.name: strategy
parameters.description: The name of the chunking strategy

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the  for the strategy

functions.name: listCollections
functions.description:
Lists all knowledge collections.

Returns every collection in the system. Use optional parameters
to filter or paginate the results.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of  objects

functions.name: listDocuments
functions.description:
Lists all documents in a knowledge collection.

Returns the documents belonging to the specified collection with
their metadata. Does not include chunk-level content.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of  objects

functions.name: rechunkDocument
functions.description:
Re-chunks a document using updated chunking settings.

Discards existing chunks and re-processes the document with the
current or specified chunking strategy. Useful after changing
collection settings or chunking parameters.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the document to re-chunk

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Optional parameters specifying the new chunking configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves when re-chunking is complete

functions.name: updateChunk
functions.description:
Updates a specific chunk's content or metadata.

Modifies an individual chunk within a document. Useful for
correcting chunking artifacts or adding manual annotations.

parameters.name: chunkId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the chunk to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update on the chunk

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the chunk has been updated

functions.name: updateCollection
functions.description:
Updates a knowledge collection's properties.

Modifies collection settings such as name, description, or
chunking configuration.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated

functions.name: updateSettings
functions.description:
Updates the settings for a knowledge collection.

Modifies chunking strategy, chunk size, overlap, and other processing
parameters. Existing documents are not automatically re-chunked;
use  to apply new settings to existing content.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The settings to update

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated

functions.name: createEdge
functions.description:
Creates a new edge (relationship) in a knowledge graph instance.

Edges connect two records with a typed relationship, forming the
graph structure. Each edge has a source record, target record,
and relationship type.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the graph instance

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Edge creation payload including source, target, and relationship type

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created

functions.name: createInstance
functions.description:
Creates a new knowledge graph instance.

Provisions an empty graph that can be populated with records and edges.
Optionally created from a template to inherit schema constraints.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Instance creation payload including name and optional template reference

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created

functions.name: createInstanceTemplate
functions.description:
Creates a new knowledge graph instance template.

Templates define the schema and structure for knowledge graph instances.
Use templates to enforce consistent node types and edge patterns
across multiple graph instances.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Template creation payload including schema definition

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created

functions.name: createRecord
functions.description:
Creates a new record (node) in a knowledge graph instance.

Records represent entities or concepts in the graph. Each record
has a type, properties, and can be connected to other records
through edges.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the graph instance

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Record creation payload including type and properties

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created

functions.name: createView
functions.description:
Creates a new view for querying a knowledge graph.

Views are saved queries that extract specific subsets of graph data.
They can be created from a template or with a custom query definition.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: View creation payload including query definition and target instance

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created

functions.name: createViewTemplate
functions.description:
Creates a new view template for knowledge graphs.

View templates define reusable query patterns for extracting
specific subsets of graph data. They act as saved queries that
can be instantiated with different parameters.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: View template creation payload including query definition

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created

functions.name: deleteEdge
functions.description:
Deletes an edge from a knowledge graph instance.

Removes the relationship between two records. The records
themselves are not affected.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the graph instance

parameters.name: edgeId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the edge to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when deletion is complete

functions.name: deleteInstance
functions.description:
Deletes a knowledge graph instance and all its data.

Permanently removes the instance including all records, edges, and
associated views. This action cannot be undone.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the instance to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when deletion is complete

functions.name: deleteInstanceTemplate
functions.description:
Deletes a knowledge graph instance template.

Removes the template definition. Instances created from this template
continue to exist but can no longer reference the deleted template.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the template to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when deletion is complete

functions.name: deleteRecord
functions.description:
Deletes a record from a knowledge graph instance.

Removes the node and any edges connected to it. This may affect
the connectivity of the graph.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the graph instance

parameters.name: recordId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the record to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when deletion is complete

functions.name: deleteView
functions.description:
Deletes a view.

Removes the saved query. The underlying graph data is not affected.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the view to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when deletion is complete

functions.name: deleteViewTemplate
functions.description:
Deletes a view template.

Removes the template definition. Views created from this template
continue to exist independently.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the view template to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when deletion is complete

functions.name: executeView
functions.description:
Executes a view and returns the query results.

Runs the view's query against its associated graph instance and
returns the matching records and edges. This is the primary way
to extract data from a knowledge graph.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the view to execute

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional runtime parameters to pass to the view query

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the query results (records and edges)

functions.name: expandNode
functions.description:
Expands a node to reveal its immediate connections.

Starting from a specific record, returns all directly connected
records and the edges linking them. Useful for interactive graph
exploration where users progressively reveal the graph structure.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the graph instance

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Expansion parameters specifying which node to expand and direction

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the connected records and edges

functions.name: getInstance
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific knowledge graph instance by its ID.

Returns the full details of a graph instance including its metadata,
template reference, and statistics.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the graph instance

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the

functions.name: getInstanceTemplate
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific knowledge graph instance template by its ID.

Returns the full template definition including its schema, node types,
and edge constraints.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the instance template

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the

functions.name: getRecord
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific record from a knowledge graph instance.

Returns the full record including all its properties and type
information.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the graph instance

parameters.name: recordId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the record within the instance

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the

functions.name: getSubgraph
functions.description:
Retrieves a subgraph of a knowledge graph instance.

Returns a portion of the graph centered around specified nodes or
matching certain criteria. Useful for visualizing local neighborhoods
without loading the entire graph.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the graph instance

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional parameters controlling subgraph scope (e.g., center node, depth)

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the subgraph data including records and edges

functions.name: getViewTemplate
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific view template by its ID.

Returns the full template definition including its query pattern
and configurable parameters.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the view template

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the

functions.name: listEdges
functions.description:
Lists all edges in a knowledge graph instance.

Returns the relationships between records with their types and
endpoint references. Use optional parameters to filter by type.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the graph instance

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of  objects

functions.name: listInstances
functions.description:
Lists all knowledge graph instances.

Returns every graph instance in the system with their metadata
and record/edge counts.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of  objects

functions.name: listInstanceTemplates
functions.description:
Lists all knowledge graph instance templates.

Returns every template in the system with their schema definitions
and metadata.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of  objects

functions.name: listRecords
functions.description:
Lists all records in a knowledge graph instance.

Returns the nodes in the graph with their types and properties.
Use optional parameters to filter by type or paginate results.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the graph instance

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of  objects

functions.name: listViews
functions.description:
Lists all knowledge graph views.

Returns every view with their query definitions and associated
graph instances.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of  objects

functions.name: listViewTemplates
functions.description:
Lists all knowledge graph view templates.

Returns every view template with their query definitions and metadata.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of  objects

functions.name: updateInstanceTemplate
functions.description:
Updates a knowledge graph instance template.

Modifies the template's schema or metadata. Existing instances
created from this template are not automatically updated.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the template to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated

functions.name: updateRecord
functions.description:
Updates a record in a knowledge graph instance.

Modifies the record's properties or type. Only the fields provided
in the request body are updated.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the graph instance

parameters.name: recordId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the record to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update on the record

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated

functions.name: updateViewTemplate
functions.description:
Updates a view template.

Modifies the template's query definition or metadata. Existing
views created from this template are not automatically updated.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the view template to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated

functions.name: createInstance
functions.description:
Creates a new KV store instance.

An instance is an isolated key-value store that can contain multiple
namespaces. Use separate instances to isolate data between different
agents or workflows.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Instance creation payload including name and configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created

functions.name: deleteInstance
functions.description:
Deletes a KV store instance and all its data.

Permanently removes the instance, all its namespaces, and all
stored key-value pairs. This action cannot be undone.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the instance to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when deletion is complete

functions.name: deleteNamespace
functions.description:
Deletes all key-value pairs within a namespace.

Clears the entire namespace, removing every key and its associated
value. Other namespaces in the instance are not affected.

parameters.name: instanceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the KV store instance

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: The namespace to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the namespace has been cleared

functions.name: deleteValue
functions.description:
Deletes a single key-value pair from the store.

Removes the specified key and its value from the namespace. Other
keys in the same namespace are not affected.

parameters.name: instanceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the KV store instance

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: The namespace containing the key

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the key-value pair has been deleted

functions.name: getInstance
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific KV store instance by its ID.

Returns the full details of the instance including its configuration
and namespace listing.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the KV store instance

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the

functions.name: getValue
functions.description:
Retrieves a value by its key within a specific namespace.

Looks up a single key-value pair in the specified instance and
namespace. Returns the value along with its metadata.

parameters.name: instanceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the KV store instance

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: The namespace containing the key

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key to look up

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the  including the stored data

functions.name: listInstances
functions.description:
Lists all KV store instances.

Returns every instance in the system with their metadata and
namespace information.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of  objects

functions.name: query
functions.description:
Queries key-value data using filter criteria.

Searches across namespaces and keys using the provided filter
parameters. Useful for finding values that match specific patterns
or conditions.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Query parameters specifying filters and scope

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of matching  objects

functions.name: setValue
functions.description:
Sets a key-value pair in the store.

Creates or overwrites a value at the specified key within a namespace
and instance. The value can be any JSON-serializable data.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The set request including instance ID, namespace, key, and value

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the stored

functions.name: updateInstance
functions.description:
Updates a KV store instance's configuration.

Modifies instance properties such as name or settings. The stored
data is not affected by instance updates.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the instance to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated

functions.name: add
functions.description:
Adds a custom language server configuration to the workspace.

Registers a new language server entry with custom settings, allowing you to configure
language servers that are not in the default catalog or to override default settings
for existing servers.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The language server configuration to add

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the configuration has been saved

functions.name: getInstalled
functions.description:
Retrieves the list of language servers currently installed in the workspace.

Returns metadata for each installed language server including its name, supported
languages, and current status. Use this to check which LSP capabilities are available
before performing language-specific operations.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of installed language server configurations

functions.name: install
functions.description:
Installs a language server by downloading and configuring it for use in the workspace.

Triggers the installation process for a specified language server. The server will be
downloaded and set up so it can provide LSP features for its supported languages.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The installation request configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the installation request has been accepted

functions.name: cancelDownload
functions.description:
Cancels an in-progress model download.

Stops the download of a model that was previously initiated with .
Any partially downloaded data may be cleaned up.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The cancellation request identifying the download to stop

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the cancellation has been processed

functions.name: deleteLocalModel
functions.description:
Deletes a locally downloaded model from disk.

Permanently removes a model that was previously downloaded for local execution,
freeing up disk space. The model can be re-downloaded later if needed.

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: The identifier of the local model to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the model has been deleted

functions.name: downloadModel
functions.description:
Initiates the download of a model for local use.

Starts an asynchronous download of a model that can be run locally (e.g., via Ollama).
Use  to monitor progress.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The download request specifying which model to download

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the download has been initiated

functions.name: getAllModels
functions.description:
Retrieves all models across all configured providers.

Returns a flat list of every available model from all providers. Optionally accepts
filter criteria to narrow results by capability, provider, or other attributes.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Optional filter criteria for narrowing the model list

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of all available LLM models

functions.name: getDownloadedLocalModels
functions.description:
Retrieves the list of models that have been downloaded for local execution.

Returns all models currently available on disk for local inference, as opposed to
cloud-hosted models that require API calls.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of locally downloaded models

functions.name: getDownloadStatus
functions.description:
Checks the current download status of a model.

Returns progress information for an active or completed model download, including
percentage complete, bytes downloaded, and any error state.

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: The identifier of the model to check

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the current download status

functions.name: getEmbeddingSupportedLLMs
functions.description:
Retrieves LLM providers that support text embedding capabilities.

Filters providers to only those offering embedding models, which convert text into
numerical vectors for semantic search, similarity matching, and RAG workflows.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of embedding-capable LLM providers

functions.name: getLocalAgent
functions.description:
Retrieves the LLM configuration for a specific local agent.

Returns the provider and model settings that have been configured for the given agent,
or the default configuration if no agent-specific override exists.

parameters.name: agentName
parameters.description: The name of the agent whose LLM configuration to retrieve

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the agent's LLM configuration

functions.name: getModels
functions.description:
Retrieves the available models for a specific LLM provider.

Queries the models catalog for a given provider, returning all models that can be
used with that provider's current configuration and API key.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The request specifying which provider's models to retrieve

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of models available for the provider

functions.name: getPricing
functions.description:
Fetches the current pricing information for all LLM models.

Returns token pricing data (input/output cost per token) for each model across all
providers. Useful for cost estimation and budget tracking of LLM usage.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the pricing data for all available models

functions.name: getProviders
functions.description:
Retrieves all configured LLM providers with their current status and available models.

Returns the complete list of LLM providers (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama) that have
been configured in the system, including whether they have valid API keys set.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of LLM provider configurations

functions.name: setDefault
functions.description:
Sets the default LLM model and provider for the workspace.

Configures which model is used by default when no specific model is requested.
This affects all operations that rely on LLM inference without explicit model selection.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The default LLM configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the default has been updated

functions.name: setLocalAgent
functions.description:
Configures the LLM settings for a specific local agent.

Allows overriding the default LLM configuration on a per-agent basis, so different
agents can use different models or provider settings tailored to their tasks.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The agent-specific LLM configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the agent configuration has been saved

functions.name: updateKey
functions.description:
Updates the API key for a specific LLM provider.

Sets or rotates the authentication key used to communicate with an LLM provider's API.
The key is stored securely and used for all subsequent requests to that provider.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The key update request

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the key has been updated

functions.name: updatePricingToLocal
functions.description:
Syncs the latest LLM pricing information to local storage.

Downloads the most up-to-date pricing catalog from the remote source and persists it
locally. Call this periodically to ensure cost calculations reflect current rates.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the local pricing data has been updated

functions.name: delete
functions.description:
Deletes a downloaded model from local storage.

Permanently removes the model files from disk, freeing storage space. The model must
be unloaded from memory before deletion. It can be re-downloaded later if needed.

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the model to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the model has been removed from disk

functions.name: download
functions.description:
Initiates the download of a model for local execution.

Starts an asynchronous download of the specified model. Large models may take
significant time and disk space. Monitor download progress through status endpoints.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The download request configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the download has been initiated

functions.name: get
functions.description:
Retrieves detailed information about a specific local model.

Returns comprehensive metadata for a model including its size, quantization level,
architecture, and current status (downloaded, loaded, etc.).

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the model to retrieve

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the model's detailed information

functions.name: getAvailable
functions.description:
Retrieves the catalog of models available for local download and execution.

Returns all models that can be downloaded from supported registries (e.g., Ollama, GGUF)
for local inference. Use this to browse what models are available before downloading.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of available local models

functions.name: list
functions.description:
Lists all models that have been downloaded to the local machine.

Returns metadata for models currently stored on disk, regardless of whether they are
currently loaded into memory for inference.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of downloaded local models

functions.name: load
functions.description:
Loads a downloaded model into system memory for inference.

Prepares a local model for use by loading its weights into RAM or VRAM. The model
must be downloaded first. Once loaded, it can serve inference requests without
additional startup latency.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The load request configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the model has been loaded into memory

functions.name: unload
functions.description:
Unloads a model from system memory.

Releases the memory (RAM/VRAM) occupied by a loaded model. The model remains on disk
and can be loaded again later. Use this to free resources when a model is no longer needed.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The unload request configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the model has been unloaded from memory

functions.name: acknowledgeMessage
functions.description:
Acknowledges receipt and processing of a message.

Signals that the receiving agent has processed the message content and taken
any required action. This is distinct from marking as read and indicates explicit
acknowledgment of the message's intent.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the message to acknowledge

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the acknowledgment has been recorded

functions.name: checkReservationConflicts
functions.description:
Checks whether a proposed reservation would conflict with existing ones.

Validates that a resource is available before attempting to reserve it. Use this to
implement optimistic locking patterns where agents check availability before acting.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The conflict check payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an object indicating whether a conflict exists

functions.name: createAgent
functions.description:
Registers a new agent in the mail system.

Creates a mail identity for an agent, enabling it to send messages, receive mail in
its inbox, and participate in threaded conversations with other agents.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The agent registration payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly registered mail agent

functions.name: createReservation
functions.description:
Creates a resource reservation for an agent.

Reserves exclusive access to a shared resource (e.g., a file, tool, or service) for
the requesting agent. Other agents can check for conflicts before attempting to access
the same resource.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The reservation request payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created reservation

functions.name: createThread
functions.description:
Creates a new mail thread for agent-to-agent communication.

Initiates a new conversation thread that messages can be posted to. Threads provide
a structured way to organize multi-message exchanges between agents on a specific topic.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The thread creation payload

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created mail thread

functions.name: createThreadMessage
functions.description:
Adds a new message to an existing mail thread.
