functions.name: checkIfUserExistsLocally
functions.description:
Checks if a user exists locally in the system.

Verifies whether a user with the specified credentials or identifier
is already present in the local user store. Useful for preventing
duplicate registrations during setup.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Request containing user identification information

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an object with an 'exists' boolean flag

functions.name: createUser
functions.description:
Creates a new user account in the system.

Registers a new local user with the provided credentials and profile
information. The user will be available for authentication immediately
after creation.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Request containing user creation details

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created User object

functions.name: getMessages
functions.description:
Retrieves saved messages from conversation history.

Returns previously saved message history, optionally filtered by agent
or other criteria. Useful for restoring conversation context or
displaying chat history in the UI.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering messages

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of message objects

functions.name: logout
functions.description:
Logs out the current authenticated user.

Ends the current user session and invalidates authentication tokens.
Optionally accepts logout request data for additional session handling.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Optional logout request parameters

returns.description: A promise that resolves when logout is complete

functions.name: saveMessages
functions.description:
Saves message history for a specific agent.

Persists a batch of messages associated with an agent's conversation.
This maintains conversation history across sessions and enables
context retention for continued interactions.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Request containing messages to save

returns.description: A promise that resolves when messages have been saved

functions.name: addChunks
functions.description:
Adds chunks to a vector collection.

Manually adds pre-chunked text segments to the collection with their
embeddings. This is useful when you have custom chunking logic or
want to add chunks without full document processing.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the target collection

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The chunks to add with their embeddings and metadata

returns.description: A promise that resolves when chunks have been added

functions.name: addDocuments
functions.description:
Adds documents to a vector collection.

Ingests new documents into the collection, automatically generating
embeddings and storing them for similarity search. Documents can include
text content and metadata for filtering.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the target collection

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The documents to add along with their metadata

returns.description: A promise that resolves when documents have been added

functions.name: createCollection
functions.description:
Creates a new vector collection.

Initializes a new collection with specified configuration including
dimensionality, embedding model, and metadata settings. Collections
are used to store and manage vectors for similarity search operations.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The collection configuration data including name, dimensions, and settings

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created VectorCollection object

functions.name: createIndex
functions.description:
Creates a vector index for a collection.

Initializes an index structure to optimize similarity search
performance. Indexes enable fast nearest neighbor queries on
high-dimensional vectors and are essential for efficient retrieval.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The index creation configuration

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the index has been created

functions.name: deleteChunk
functions.description:
Deletes a specific chunk from a vector collection.

Removes a single chunk by its unique identifier. This is useful for
granular cleanup when individual chunks need to be removed without
affecting other content in the collection.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection

parameters.name: chunkId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the chunk to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the chunk has been deleted

functions.name: deleteCollection
functions.description:
Deletes a vector collection.

Permanently removes a collection and all its associated data including
documents, chunks, and index information. This operation cannot be undone.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the collection has been deleted

functions.name: deleteDocuments
functions.description:
Deletes documents from a vector collection.

Removes specified documents from the collection based on provided
criteria such as document IDs or metadata filters. This operation
cleans up the collection and frees storage.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Optional deletion criteria for selecting documents to remove

returns.description: A promise that resolves when documents have been deleted

functions.name: getChunks
functions.description:
Retrieves chunks from a vector collection.

Fetches text chunks that were created when documents were processed.
Chunks are smaller segments of documents used for more granular
similarity search and retrieval operations.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of VectorChunk objects

functions.name: getCollection
functions.description:
Retrieves a vector collection by its ID.

Fetches detailed information about a specific collection including
its configuration, statistics, and metadata. Use this to inspect
collection properties or verify collection existence.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection to retrieve

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the VectorCollection object

functions.name: getDocuments
functions.description:
Retrieves documents from a vector collection.

Fetches documents stored in the collection with optional filtering and
pagination parameters. Use this to inspect stored content or retrieve
specific documents by criteria.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of VectorDocument objects

functions.name: getSettings
functions.description:
Retrieves settings for a vector collection.

Fetches the configuration and settings applied to a collection
including index types, distance metrics, and other operational
parameters.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the VectorCollectionSettings object

functions.name: listCollections
functions.description:
Lists all vector collections.

Retrieves every collection in the vector database system. Use optional
query parameters to filter or paginate results. This is useful for
browsing available collections or displaying a collection catalog.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering or pagination

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of VectorCollection objects

functions.name: query
functions.description:
Queries a vector collection for similar documents.

Performs semantic similarity search using a query vector or text.
Returns documents or chunks ranked by similarity score, enabling
retrieval of contextually relevant content for RAG applications.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection to query

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The query configuration including vector or text and search parameters

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of VectorSearchResult objects

functions.name: updateCollection
functions.description:
Updates a vector collection.

Modifies the configuration of an existing collection such as name,
metadata, or other configurable properties. The collection ID must
be valid and the collection must exist.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The update data with fields to modify

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated VectorCollection object

functions.name: updateSettings
functions.description:
Updates settings for a vector collection.

Modifies the configuration parameters of a collection such as
distance metric, index type, or other settings. Some settings
may require index rebuild or have performance implications.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the collection to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The settings to update with new values

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated VectorCollectionSettings object

functions.name: change
functions.description:
Changes the active workspace to the specified one.

Updates the active workspace context directly without requiring
a separate selection object. This is a simplified version of the
select operation for quick workspace switching.

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workspace to activate

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the workspace has been changed

functions.name: getById
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific workspace by its unique identifier.

Returns detailed information about a single workspace including
its settings, members, projects, and configuration metadata.

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workspace to retrieve

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the requested Workspace object

functions.name: list
functions.description:
Lists all available workspaces for the current user.

Returns every workspace the user has access to, including their
personal workspaces and any shared workspaces. Useful for workspace
browsing and selection UIs.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of Workspace objects

functions.name: listProjects
functions.description:
Lists all projects in the current workspace.

Returns an array of workspace projects with their metadata and status.
Use this to display available projects or navigate between them.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of WorkspaceProject objects

functions.name: select
functions.description:
Selects a workspace as the active context.

Switches the active workspace to the specified one, updating all
subsequent API calls to operate within that workspace context.
This affects project selection, file access, and other operations.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Request containing workspace selection details

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the workspace has been selected
